sentences.target: Tu perces le mur trop près du câble.
sentences.reading: /ty pɛʁs lə myʁ tʁo pʁɛ dy kabl/

translations.fr: Tu perces le mur trop près du câble.
translations.ipa: /ty pɛʁs lə myʁ tʁo pʁɛ dy kabl/
translations.en: You're drilling the wall too close to the cable.
translations.es: Estás taladrando la pared demasiado cerca del cable.
translations.de: Du bohrst in die Wand zu nah am Kabel.
translations.it: Stai forando il muro troppo vicino al cavo.
translations.ko: 케이블에 너무 가까운 곳에 구멍을 뚫고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 你在墙上钻孔离电缆太近了。
translations.yue: 你喺牆上鑽孔離電纜太近。
translations.ru: Ты сверлишь стену слишком близко к кабелю.
translations.pt: Você está furando a parede muito perto do cabo.
translations.he: אתה קודח בקיר קרוב מדי לכבל.
translations.vi: Bạn đang khoan tường quá gần dây cáp.
translations.ar: أنت تثقب الجدار قريبًا جدًا من السلك.
translations.nl: Je boort te dicht bij de kabel in de muur.
translations.uk: Ти свердлиш стіну занадто близько до кабелю.
translations.hu: Túl közel a kábelhez fúrod a falat.
translations.hi: तुम दीवार में केबल के बहुत पास ड्रिल कर रहे हो.
translations.pl: Wiercisz w ścianie zbyt blisko kabla.
translations.el: Τρυπάς τον τοίχο πολύ κοντά στο καλώδιο.
translations.nb: Du borer i veggen altfor nær kabelen.
translations.id: Kamu sedang mengebor dinding terlalu dekat dengan kabel.
translations.sv: Du borrar i väggen alldeles för nära kabeln.
translations.ro: Găurești peretele prea aproape de cablu.
translations.cs: Vrtáš do zdi příliš blízko kabelu.
translations.da: Du borer i væggen alt for tæt på kablet.
translations.ja: ケーブルに近すぎる位置で壁に穴を開けています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; action of drilling/piercing.
Definite article, masculine singular, marking the noun 'mur'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'perces'.
Degree adverb meaning excess; modifies 'près'.
Adverb of proximity; typically used with 'de' to form 'près de' ('near').
Preposition 'de' contracted with definite article 'le' (= 'du'); governed by 'près' to mark proximity to 'câble'.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'du'.

sentences.target: On perce deux trous pour fixer l'étagère.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ pɛʁs dø tʁu puʁ fiksɛ l‿etaʒɛʁ/

translations.fr: On perce deux trous pour fixer l'étagère.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ pɛʁs dø tʁu puʁ fiksɛ l‿etaʒɛʁ/
translations.en: We're drilling two holes to mount the shelf.
translations.es: Estamos taladrando dos agujeros para montar la estantería.
translations.de: Wir bohren zwei Löcher, um das Regal zu montieren.
translations.it: Stiamo facendo due fori per montare la mensola.
translations.ko: 선반을 설치하려고 두 개의 구멍을 뚫고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在墙上钻两个孔来安装搁板。
translations.yue: 我哋為咗安裝層架鑽兩個窿。
translations.ru: Мы сверлим два отверстия, чтобы установить полку.
translations.pt: Estamos furando dois buracos para instalar a prateleira.
translations.he: אנחנו קודחים שני חורים כדי להתקין את המדף.
translations.tr: Rafı monte etmek için iki delik açıyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang khoan hai lỗ để lắp kệ.
translations.nl: We boren twee gaten om de plank te monteren.
translations.uk: Ми свердлимо два отвори, щоб встановити полицю.
translations.hu: Két lyukat fúrunk, hogy felszereljük a polcot.
translations.hi: हम शेल्फ लगाने के लिए दो छेद ड्रिल कर रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Wiercimy dwa otwory, żeby zamontować półkę.
translations.el: Τρυπάμε δύο τρύπες για να τοποθετήσουμε το ράφι.
translations.nb: Vi borer to hull for å montere hyllen.
translations.id: Kami sedang mengebor dua lubang untuk memasang rak.
translations.sv: Vi borrar två hål för att montera hyllan.
translations.ro: Dăm două găuri ca să montăm raftul.
translations.cs: Vrtáme dvě díry, abychom namontovali polici.
translations.da: Vi borer to huller for at montere hylden.
translations.fi: Poraamme kaksi reikää, jotta voimme asentaa hyllyn.
translations.ja: 棚を取り付けるために穴を二つ開けています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/impersonal subject pronoun often used as 'we' in colloquial French.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular agreeing with 'on'.
Cardinal numeral quantifying 'trous'.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of 'perce'.
Preposition expressing purpose ('in order to'); introduces the infinitive 'fixer'.
Infinitive verb complement of 'pour'.
Common noun; elided definite article 'l'' (le/la) is attached; object of 'fixer'.

sentences.target: Il faut percer doucement le carrelage.

translations.fr: Il faut percer doucement le carrelage.
translations.en: You have to drill the tile gently.
translations.es: Hay que taladrar el azulejo con cuidado.
translations.de: Man muss die Fliese vorsichtig bohren.
translations.it: Bisogna forare la piastrella con delicatezza.
translations.pt: É preciso furar o azulejo com cuidado.
translations.vi: Cần khoan gạch một cách nhẹ nhàng.
translations.nl: Je moet de tegel voorzichtig boren.
translations.hi: टाइल को धीरे-धीरे ड्रिल करना चाहिए.
translations.el: Πρέπει να τρυπήσεις το πλακάκι προσεκτικά.
translations.sv: Man måste borra försiktigt i kaklet.
translations.ro: Trebuie să găurești gresia cu grijă.
translations.da: Man skal bore i flisen forsigtigt.
translations.ja: タイルは慎重に穴を開ける必要があります。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun in an impersonal construction with 'falloir' (no concrete referent).
Impersonal verb, present 3rd person singular; expresses necessity.
Infinitive verb used as complement of 'faut'.
Adverb of manner; modifies 'percer'.
Definite article, masculine singular, marking 'carrelage'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'percer'.

sentences.target: Je perce la citrouille pour la lanterne.
sentences.reading: /ʒə pɛʁs la sitʁuj puʁ la lɑ̃tɛʁn/

translations.fr: Je perce la citrouille pour la lanterne.
translations.ipa: /ʒə pɛʁs la sitʁuj puʁ la lɑ̃tɛʁn/
translations.en: I'm drilling the pumpkin for the lantern.
translations.es: Estoy taladrando la calabaza para la linterna.
translations.de: Ich bohre den Kürbis für die Laterne.
translations.it: Sto forando la zucca per la lanterna.
translations.zh-Hans: 我为了灯笼在南瓜上钻孔。
translations.yue: 我為咗做燈籠喺南瓜上鑽孔。
translations.pt: Estou furando a abóbora para a lanterna.
translations.vi: Tôi đang khoan quả bí ngô để làm lồng đèn.
translations.ar: أنا أثقب اليقطينة من أجل الفانوس.
translations.nl: Ik boor in de pompoen voor de lantaarn.
translations.hi: मैं लालटेन के लिए कद्दू में ड्रिल कर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Τρυπάω την κολοκύθα για το φανάρι.
translations.nb: Jeg borer i gresskaret til lanternen.
translations.id: Saya sedang mengebor labu untuk lampion.
translations.sv: Jag borrar i pumpan till lyktan.
translations.da: Jeg borer i græskarret til lanternen.
translations.ja: ランタンのためにカボチャに穴を開けています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular.
Definite article, feminine singular, marking 'citrouille'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'perce'.
Preposition indicating purpose; introduces the noun phrase 'la lanterne'.
Definite article, feminine singular, marking 'lanterne'.
Common noun, feminine; object of 'pour' indicating purpose.
